name: setup
description: Sets up new projects and generates workflow files like CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, Plans.md. Use when user mentions セットアップ, setup, 初期化, initialize, 新規プロジェクト, ワークフローファイル生成. Do NOT load for: 実装作業, レビュー, ビルド検証, デプロイ.
capabilities: Generates CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, and Plans.md workflow files
Creates secure Claude Code settings with proper permissions
Provides adaptive setup based on project analysis
Scaffolds new project structures with technology-specific templates
Asks users to clarify ambiguous project states
Merges settings non-destructively with existing configurations
author: Chachamaru127
securitySummary: This skill contains only documentation files (doc.md) describing project setup workflows. All static findings are false positives because the files are documentation, not executable code. Shell command examples in documentation are instructional references for legitimate git/npm operations, not actual code execution. JSON examples for Claude Code settings are standard configuration templates. No network calls, no credential exfiltration, and no malicious patterns present.
valueStatement: Setting up new projects with proper workflow files is time-consuming. This skill automates the creation of CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, and Plans.md with project-specific configurations.
userTitle: Automate Project Setup for Claude Code
limitations: Requires external template files not included in this directory
Depends on scripts/analyze-project.sh for project analysis
Needs separate template directory for workflow file generation
Japanese language documentation may limit accessibility

useCases.title: Initialize Claude Code Projects
useCases.description: Set up complete workflow files and project structure for new Claude Code projects with proper permissions and agent coordination.

useCases.title: Standardize Project Setup
useCases.description: Ensure consistent project initialization across teams with predefined templates and security-conscious settings.

useCases.title: Add Workflow Files to Existing Projects
useCases.description: Generate missing CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, and Plans.md files for existing projects without overwriting current configurations.

promptTemplates.title: Basic Project Setup
promptTemplates.prompt: Set up a new Next.js project with TypeScript, including all necessary workflow files for Claude Code collaboration.

promptTemplates.title: Python API Setup
promptTemplates.scenario: Creating a new Python backend API
promptTemplates.prompt: Initialize a Python FastAPI project with proper project structure and Claude Code workflow files.

promptTemplates.title: Add Workflow to Existing
promptTemplates.prompt: Add CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, and Plans.md to my existing React project while preserving current settings.

promptTemplates.title: Secure Settings Configuration
promptTemplates.prompt: Generate Claude Code settings with bypassPermissions enabled but deny access to .env files and credentials.

bestPractices: Always review generated settings.json before committing to ensure permissions align with your security requirements
Use the adaptive-setup skill to automatically detect your project type and apply appropriate templates
Create a .claude/settings.local.json file for personal preferences that should not be shared
antiPatterns: Do not manually edit workflow files after generation - use the skill to regenerate them consistently
Avoid committing sensitive information like API keys even with deny permissions in place
Do not skip the project type confirmation when the skill detects ambiguity

faq.question: Is this skill compatible with all Claude Code versions?
faq.answer: Yes, it generates standard Claude Code configuration files that work with all recent versions.

faq.question: What happens if I already have a settings.json file?
faq.answer: The skill will merge your existing settings non-destructively, preserving your current configurations while adding new permissions.

faq.question: Can I integrate this with my CI/CD pipeline?
faq.answer: Yes, the generated workflow files are text-based and can be version controlled and deployed through your normal CI/CD process.

faq.question: How does the skill protect my sensitive data?
faq.answer: It includes deny permissions for .env files, credentials, passwords, and secrets by default in the generated settings.

faq.question: What if the skill cannot determine my project type?
faq.answer: It will ask you to clarify whether it is a new or existing project before proceeding with setup.

faq.question: Can I customize the generated templates?
faq.answer: The skill uses templates from the templates/ directory. You can modify these templates to match your team standards.
